messages.content: 中译英：2021.12开始我是她大学毕业论文项目《基于电商直播的美妆品牌营销策略研究----以花西子为例》的指导老师。

Starting from December 2021, I have been the supervisor of her college graduation thesis project titled "A Study on Marketing Strategies of Cosmetics Brands Based on E-commerce Live Streaming - Taking Huaxizi as an Example".

润色如下内容：Starting from December 2021, I have been the supervisor of her college graduation thesis project titled “A Study on Marketing Strategies of Cosmetics Brands Based on E-commerce Live Streaming - Taking Huaxizi as an Example”.

Starting from December 2021, I have been serving as the advisor for her college graduation thesis project entitled "A Study on Marketing Strategies of Cosmetics Brands Based on E-commerce Live Streaming - Taking Huaxizi as an Example."

润色如下内容：This letter serves as a postgraduate study recommendation for Miss Zhijun HUANG. I have known Zhijun well and have been serving as the supervisor for her graduation thesis project entitled “A Study on Marketing Strategies of Cosmetics Brands Based on E-commerce Live Streaming - Taking Huaxizi as an Example” since December 2021. Being her supervisor, I thus have a good chance to observe her performance and am qualified to provide an appraisal of her potential.

This letter serves as a recommendation for Miss Zhijun Huang's postgraduate studies. I have had the pleasure of getting to know Zhijun well and have been acting as her supervisor for her graduation thesis project titled "A Study on Marketing Strategies of Cosmetics Brands Based on E-commerce Live Streaming - Taking Huaxizi as an Example" since December 2021. As her supervisor, I have had the opportunity to closely observe her performance and am more than qualified to provide an appraisal of her potential.
中译英：在毕业论文项目中，她敏锐地观察到国内电商直播兴起的风潮，联系当下国内美妆品牌的发展，捕捉到国内相关领域研究的有限性，发现目前对美妆品牌的营销策略研究主要集中在已有一定实体基础的老牌品牌上，较少关注更加依托互联网发展新兴品牌，进而确定论文选题，将传统营销理论与电商直播发展现状相结合，基于现实背景，分析现存问题，提出具体优化建议。

Within her graduation thesis project, she showed keen observation of the rising trend of e-commerce live streaming in China. By analyzing the current development of domestic cosmetics brands and recognizing the limited research in this field, she identified a gap in the existing studies, which primarily focused on well-established brands with a physical presence and paid limited attention to emerging brands that heavily rely on internet development. This led her to determine the topic of her thesis, where she combined traditional marketing theories with the current status of e-commerce live streaming. Taking into account the real-life context, she conducted an analysis of existing issues and proposed concrete optimization suggestions.

润色如下内容：Within her graduation thesis project, she showed keen observation of the rising trend of e-commerce live streaming in China. By analyzing the current development of domestic cosmetics brands and recognizing the limited research in this field, she identified a gap in the existing studies, which primarily focused on well-established brands with a physical presence and paid limited attention to emerging brands that heavily rely on internet development. This led her to determine the topic of her thesis, where she combined traditional marketing theories with the current status of e-commerce live streaming. Taking into account the real-life context, she conducted an analysis of existing issues and proposed concrete optimization suggestions.

During her graduation thesis project, she demonstrated a sharp observation of the growing phenomenon of e-commerce live streaming in China. Through a thorough analysis of the progress of domestic cosmetics brands, she acknowledged the limited research available in this area. She notably recognized that existing studies predominantly focused on well-established brands with physical stores, neglecting the emerging brands that heavily depend on internet development. This realization led her to choose her thesis topic, in which she skillfully merged traditional marketing theories with the current landscape of e-commerce live streaming. With a deep understanding of the real-life context, she conducted an insightful analysis of the prevailing challenges and presented concrete optimization suggestions.
中译英：她并不局限于该领域内现有的调查研究资料，而是从多维度尽最大可能提出自己的思考和观点，这也体现了作为学生可贵的不断追求、精益求精的精神。

She did not confine herself to the existing research data in the field but went beyond to present her own thoughts and viewpoints from multiple dimensions. This demonstrates her valuable spirit as a student, continuously pursuing excellence and striving for perfection.

润色如下内容：She did not confine herself to the existing research data in the field but went beyond to present her own thoughts and viewpoints from multiple dimensions. This demonstrates her valuable spirit as a student, continuously pursuing excellence and striving for perfection.

She didn't limit herself to the existing research data in the field, but instead, she went above and beyond to offer her own thoughts and perspectives from various dimensions. This quality demonstrates her commendable spirit as a student, as she consistently strives for excellence and perfection.
中译英：与时俱进和敏锐的洞察力
Adaptability and keen insight
润色如下内容：Adaptability and keen insight
Keeping up with the times and possessing sharp insights

中译英：在平日里她会积极地与我分享她的想法，咨询我的意见。在论文写作过程中，她也会主动与我和其他同学交流想法。我与她交流过的问题，她会及时地进行思考并给予反馈，不足的地方她会及时地改进。她能够清晰表达自己的想法，善于倾听他人意见和建议，并能够与他人建立良好的合作关系。在未知的问题上会不停的寻求答案，她的不耻下问、善于交谈、独特见解，相信她可以在贵校充分地汲取养分。她非常自律且具备强大的时间管理能力。她无须催促地守时，主动地提前进行文献搜集和阅读，能在论文创作的每个时间节点前提前完成阶段目标，并自行利用剩余的时间不断地完善成果，精益求精。值得一提的是，在论文创作过程中突然性地面临校级论文抽检，需要她比其他同学更早地完成论文，并达到一定的质量水平，时间更紧任务更重，但她仍然积极地面对困难，保持积极开朗的心态，并顺利通过了抽检。同时，毕业论文写作过程中，她会提出运用多种理论从不同方面论证自己的观点，在充分进行理论研究的同时辅以问卷调查，增加研究的严谨性，使每个观点的提出都有可靠的理论或数据做支撑，并在文章中体现。论文的格式排版插图、行文的时间顺序、逻辑顺序等细节她也会保证没有任何细节上的疏漏。

She actively shares her thoughts with me and seeks my advice on a regular basis. During the process of writing her thesis, she actively engages in discussions with me and other classmates to exchange ideas. Whenever she encounters any issues we have discussed, she promptly reflects on them and provides feedback. She shows a clear ability to articulate her thoughts, is receptive to others' opinions and suggestions, and can establish good collaborative relationships with others. In the face of unknown questions, she continuously seeks answers, demonstrating her willingness to learn, excellent communication skills, and unique insights. I believe she will fully benefit from the rich academic environment of your esteemed university.

She is highly disciplined and possesses strong time management skills. She is punctual without the need for reminders and takes the initiative to conduct literature searches and readings ahead of schedule. She consistently accomplishes the objectives for each stage of the thesis writing process ahead of time and utilizes any remaining time to continuously refine her work, striving for excellence. It is worth mentioning that she unexpectedly faced a university-level thesis sampling during the thesis writing process, which required her to complete the thesis earlier than other classmates and achieve a certain level of quality. The time was tight and the task was demanding, but she faced the challenge with a proactive and optimistic attitude, successfully passing the sampling. Additionally, throughout the thesis writing process, she applies multiple theories and conducts comprehensive research, incorporating questionnaire surveys to ensure the rigor of her study. Each point she presents has reliable theoretical or empirical support, which is reflected in her writing. She also pays attention to details such as formatting, illustrations, and the logical sequence of the text, ensuring that there are no omissions or errors in any aspect.

润色如下内容：She actively shares her thoughts with me and seeks my advice on a regular basis. During the process of writing her thesis, she actively engages in discussions with me and other classmates to exchange ideas. Whenever she encounters any issues we have discussed, she promptly reflects on them and provides feedback. She shows a clear ability to articulate her thoughts, is receptive to others’ opinions and suggestions, and can establish good collaborative relationships with others. In the face of unknown questions, she continuously seeks answers, demonstrating her willingness to learn, excellent communication skills, and unique insights. I believe she will fully benefit from the rich academic environment of your esteemed university.

She is highly disciplined and possesses strong time management skills. She is punctual without the need for reminders and takes the initiative to conduct literature searches and readings ahead of schedule. She consistently accomplishes the objectives for each stage of the thesis writing process ahead of time and utilizes any remaining time to continuously refine her work, striving for excellence. It is worth mentioning that she unexpectedly faced a university-level thesis sampling during the thesis writing process, which required her to complete the thesis earlier than other classmates and achieve a certain level of quality. The time was tight and the task was demanding, but she faced the challenge with a proactive and optimistic attitude, successfully passing the sampling. Additionally, throughout the thesis writing process, she applies multiple theories and conducts comprehensive research, incorporating questionnaire surveys to ensure the rigor of her study. Each point she presents has reliable theoretical or empirical support, which is reflected in her writing. She actively shares her thoughts with me and regularly seeks my advice. Throughout the thesis writing process, she actively engages in discussions with me and other classmates to exchange ideas. Whenever we have discussed any issues, she promptly reflects on them and provides constructive feedback. She possesses strong communication skills and can effectively articulate her thoughts. She is open to others' opinions and suggestions, establishing good collaborative relationships with her peers. Notably, when confronted with unfamiliar questions, she demonstrates a continuous pursuit of knowledge, excellent communication skills, and unique insights.

Furthermore, she displays high levels of discipline and possesses strong time management skills. She is consistently punctual and self-driven, proactively conducting literature searches and readings ahead of schedule. She consistently accomplishes the objectives for each stage of the thesis writing process in a timely manner. She utilizes any available time to continuously refine her work, meticulously seeking excellence. 

It is worth mentioning that she successfully navigated an unexpected university-level thesis sampling during the writing process. This required her to complete her thesis earlier than her classmates while maintaining a high standard of quality. Despite the tight timeline and demanding task, she approached the challenge with a proactive and optimistic attitude and successfully passed the sampling.

Throughout the thesis writing journey, she expertly applies multiple theories and conducts comprehensive research. Incorporating questionnaire surveys, she ensures the rigor of her study. Each point she presents is supported by reliable theoretical or empirical evidence, which is clearly reflected in her writing. Additionally, she pays meticulous attention to details such as formatting, illustrations, and the logical sequence of the text, ensuring there are no overlooks or errors.

In conclusion, she demonstrates exceptional qualities as a student and researcher. With her determination, dedication, and exceptional skills, I have full confidence that she will thrive in the rich academic environment of your esteemed university.

中译英：她在课题研究过程中展现出出色的查阅文献和资料的能力，能够运用所学知识和方法，深入分析问题并提出创新思路。例如，在研究过程中中，她通过广泛阅读文献，深入了解相关领域的前沿研究，为项目的发展提供了有力的支持。此外，她善于运用所学的市场营销理论工具和研究方法来进行分析，比如基于PEST 模型对花西子品牌电商直播的宏观环境进行分析，了解花西子品牌营销面临宏观环境变化；基于SWOT模型，对品牌的内外竞争环境及条件进行了分析；分析花西子的品牌现状以及电商直播营销的现行策略；针对花西子品牌营销现状及品牌电商直播营销效果设计问卷调查；基于4P模型,针对以上研究得出的不足从多个方面提出了优化建议。再者，她的跨学科研究能力也值得称道。除了既有的营销理论基础，她还会密切关注公共政治环境的发展，她在运用PEST模型对企业宏观环境进行分析时，对政治（Politics）、社会（Society）环境有重点分析，密切关注国家在美妆行业的政策变化与在电商直播行业的政策更新，深入思考变化背后的因果及后续的影响，充份体现她对这方面的浓厚兴趣，以及她自我导向、自主学习的企图心，令人赞赏。

She has demonstrated outstanding research abilities in the course of her project, excelling in literature review and data retrieval. She applies her knowledge and methods to analyze problems in-depth and propose innovative ideas. For instance, during her research, she extensively reviewed relevant literature, acquiring comprehensive understanding of frontier studies in the field and providing strong support for the project's development.

Moreover, she skillfully utilizes marketing theories and research methods, such as analyzing the macro environment of Huaxizi's brand in e-commerce live streaming based on the PEST model, understanding the macro environmental changes impacting Huaxizi's brand marketing. She also conducted a SWOT analysis to delve into the brand's internal and external competitive environment, analyzed the current status of Huaxizi's brand and its existing e-commerce live streaming marketing strategies. Furthermore, she designed a questionnaire survey to evaluate the current status and effectiveness of Huaxizi's brand marketing in e-commerce live streaming.

Additionally, she offers optimization suggestions from various perspectives based on the deficiencies identified through her research, using the 4P model. It is worth noting that her interdisciplinary research skills are commendable. In addition to her solid foundation in marketing theories, she pays close attention to the development of the public political environment. When applying the PEST model to analyze the macro environment, she focuses on the political and social aspects. She actively monitors policy changes in the cosmetics industry and the updating of policies in the e-commerce live streaming industry, deeply contemplating the underlying causes and subsequent impacts. This reflects her strong interest in this area and her proactive, self-directed learning, which is highly admirable.
